image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Township Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official logo of Bajrang Dham Township featuring Panchmukhi Hanumanji

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Township Entrance
image:image.image:caption: Main entrance gate of Bajrang Dham Township, Phase 1

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Project Board
image:image.image:caption: Premium residential plots available at Bajrang Dham

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Talab
image:image.image:caption: Beautiful serene lake at Bajrang Dham township

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Boundary Wall
image:image.image:caption: Secure boundary wall of Bajrang Dham township

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Internal Roads
image:image.image:caption: Paved internal roads inside Bajrang Dham township

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Open Land
image:image.image:caption: Premium open plot available for sale at Bajrang Dham

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Dham Lush Green Plots
image:image.image:caption: Lush green landscape and plots at Bajrang Dham

image:image.image:title: Bajrang Mandir inside Township
image:image.image:caption: Sacred Hanuman Mandir located inside the Bajrang Dham township

image:image.image:title: Nearby Dhanbad Railway Station
image:image.image:caption: Dhanbad Railway Station near the township

image:image.image:title: Nearby School Facility
image:image.image:caption: Local school situated close to Bajrang Dham

image:image.image:title: Nearby Hospital Facility
image:image.image:caption: Modern hospital facility near the township

image:image.image:title: Chhath Talab Facility
image:image.image:caption: Dedicated Chhath lake for religious ceremonies inside the township

video:video.video:title: Bajrang Dham Township Tour
video:video.video:description: Take a virtual tour of the Bajrang Dham Township to experience the serene environment, facilities, and premium land plots.
